  "observed_steps_with_evidence": [

    "A second incision is made through the right dorsal epidermis using the same biopsy punch, as seen by the repetition of the action on the opposite side.",
    "Forceps are used to tent the skin from the center of the left outlined wound area, visible as the forceps lift the skin away from the body.",

    "The excision process is repeated on the right outlined wound area, creating symmetrical excisional wounds, as seen by the similar cutting and tissue removal on the right side.",
    "Both wounds are washed with a liquid, likely sterile saline, as seen by the application of a clear liquid to the wounds.",
    "The wounds and the dorsum are covered with a transparent film dressing, as seen by the placement of a clear film over the treated area.",
    "A plastic cling-wrap drape is placed over the surgical site, as seen by the transparent plastic covering the area."
